assertions.reason: The procure-to-pay review narrates supplier CRUD and approval, purchase-order workflow, goods receipt, raw-material purchase invoicing, purchase returns, supplier payment/settlement, and supplier statement/aging views across entrypoints, service chain, data path, invariants, and failure points.

evidence.observed: Contains `## Entrypoints`, `## Data path and schema touchpoints`, `## Service chain`, `## State machine and idempotency assumptions`, and `## Risk hotspots`, matching the required narrative, invariants, and failure-point surfaces from the contract.

Service-chain subsections explicitly cover `Supplier onboarding, maintenance, and lifecycle`, `Purchase-order creation, approval, and timeline`, `Goods receipt is the stock boundary`, `Purchase invoice posting is the AP truth boundary`, and `Purchase returns reverse stock and payable together`.

Risk and state sections document supplier lifecycle rules, purchase-order workflow states, goods-receipt and purchase status assumptions, plus fail-closed settlement parity and accounting-boundary analysis.

Scrutiny summary states the doc satisfies VAL-P2P-001 and covers supplier CRUD/lifecycle, purchase-order workflow, goods receipts, raw-material purchase invoicing, purchase returns, supplier settlement, ledger/aging views, invariants, retry behavior, and integration side effects with code-grounded evidence.
Read-only validator reported `procure_to_pay: PASS` after checking the required headings and procure-to-pay integrity snippets in the documentation file.

frictions: Task delegation to `user-testing-flow-validator` failed in this environment with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`, so validation fell back to direct in-session docs inspection per `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

Passive runtime setup probes remained degraded during this round (`curl -sf http://localhost:8081/actuator/health` exited 7 and a TCP probe to 127.0.0.1:5433 returned connection refused), but the commercial-review assertion set was fully testable through `docs/code-review/**`.
